title: Yomu
description: Designed and implemented a modular backend service using layered architecture across controller, service, repository, DTO, and factory responsibilities. Applied SOLID principles, Factory Pattern-based authentication responses, JWT with softguard, validation, exception handling, role-based authentication flow, and testable service logic for scalable team development.

title: Courtify
description: Built sports court booking flows for search, filtering, schedule selection, reservation, and booking management. Integrated venue and scheduling APIs, supported Flutter mobile delivery, worked in a cross-functional Agile squad, and implemented CI/CD checks and deployment pipeline for consistent releases.

title: Extensipedia
description: Worked as a full-stack developer for BEM PE FEB UI's Extensipedia platform, handling API integration, CI/CD workflow, API contract design, design-pattern-based implementation, and VPS deployment on Hostinger.

title: Adaptive Motion Planning Arm Robot
description: Integrated Pinocchio inverse kinematics, OMPL motion planning, collision checking, and HintCache-based adaptive robotic experiments for arm robot motion planning research.
